_comment: Pippin's Bravery (LTR, {G} instant): 'You may sacrifice a Food. If you do, target creature gets +4/+4 until end of turn. Otherwise, that creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn.' Flow: cast Pippin's Bravery ({G}) targeting your Grizzly Bears (2/2). You control a Food, so the spell asks whether to sacrifice it — say YES for +4/+4 (Bears -> 6/6, Food sacrificed) or NO for +2/+2 (Bears -> 4/4). KNOWN BUG (open): the buff currently never applies (Bears stays 2/2) regardless of the choice — a targeted optional-cost spell branch isn't seeing its target. Remove the Food to test the unpayable (no-Food) path, which should still give +2/+2.
